supervisor.reason: Mandatory refine-plan execution is now enforced for run, run-once, and daemonize, and goals prompt generation now supports analyzer-led requirements analysis plus planner-owned workflow contracts.

bootstrap.goal: Make refine -> plan mandatory in run, run-once, and daemonize, and add an analyzer expert to goals prompt generation so planner-controlled workflows start from stronger prompts.

tasks.resume_checkpoint: Implementation and targeted validation are complete. Resume from commit preparation only if the user wants this Mermaid docs fix committed.

items.text: Phase 1. Replace Mermaid UML label `\n` escapes in `README.md` and `docs/GUIDE.md`
Phase 2. Add a regression test that rejects escaped newline labels inside Mermaid blocks
Phase 3. Run targeted validation for the Mermaid docs slice

next_action: Prepare the validated mandatory refine-plan and goals analyzer slice for commit and push.
notes: Treat this file as machine truth and keep Markdown synchronized.
DASHBOARD.md should show the actual progress of the active scope.
PLAN.md should list prompt-derived development items in `[ ] Phase N. <title>` format.
The installed guidance bundle and packaged asset copy should stay synchronized.
Legacy TASKS.md snapshots should be migrated forward into PLAN.md without losing checklist state.
Added analyzer to the role model and example configuration.
PipelineRunner now treats refiner and planner as mandatory stages with active CLI fallback.
run, run-once, and daemonize single-agent paths now execute a mandatory refine-plan prelude before downstream work.
GoalsScheduler can now generate prompts through analyzer -> planner -> architect and emits a workflow contract that makes planner authoritative after plan.
README.md, docs/GUIDE.md, and docs/ko/GUIDE.md now describe the new runtime and goals behavior.
Targeted validation passed for role-config, pipeline-runner, goals-scheduler, selected CLI flows, daemon flows, and Mermaid-doc coverage.

latest_commit.summary: Fix Mermaid UML line breaks in docs
